expectations.evidence: doc-update skill description: 'Auto-generates CODEMAPS (markdown for AI agents) and HUMANMAPS (HTML for humans)'. Also mentioned in workflow: 'doc-update regenerates CODEMAPS/HUMANMAPS documentation'.

The Scripts section lists init-try, migration, and coding-rules scripts but does NOT list detect_changes.mjs or extract_structure.mjs. The doc-update skill description mentions 'SHA256 hash-based incremental change detection' but does not name the scripts.

No mention of service root detection, service directories (app/, apps/, src/, pages/), or the discovery/scanning logic. The output describes doc-update only at a high level without discussing its internal detection mechanism.

suggestions: Without the skill, the agent produced broad project documentation but lacked depth on doc-update internals. The skill provides critical context about the Node.js scripts and service root detection that the agent could not infer from general exploration.
eval_feedback.overall: Partial pass. The agent correctly identified CODEMAPS/HUMANMAPS concepts but missed the specific scripts and service root detection logic, demonstrating the value of the doc-update skill for guiding detailed documentation generation.
